title: Realistic Explosion Physics
description: A realistic overhaul of Minecraft's explosion mechanics.
body:
**Description**
---
Realistic Explosion Physics aims to add realistic movement to blocks that are affected by explosions. Instead of simply breaking the blocks, they will now be given velocity based on the direction of the explosion.

Realistic Explosion Physics is also fully compatible with Realistic Block Physics!


**Related Mods**
---
For an even better experience, consider pairing this mod with the mods below that have also been developed by me.
- Realistic Block Physics
- Submerged Explosions
- Throwable Explosives
